name: NASCAR Predictions
summary: Race, stage, and Chase championship forecasts for the NASCAR Cup Series.
description: Stock-car racing on the MotorsportVerse core: a field-relative driver-skill blend with per-track-type ratings (superspeedway, intermediate, short track, road course), attrition modeled as a first-class component of every forecast, and manufacturer effects. Title odds run through a format-aware championship simulator that encodes the 2026 Chase and the 2017-2025 elimination playoffs for historical backtesting, with the playoff projection gated on a passing seven-season backtest. Runs on the real 2026 Cup season: official results flow from NASCAR's public feeds into a committed, reviewable snapshot with per-stage results captured. Experimental while forward accuracy accrues over real rounds.
datasets: NASCAR official feeds (results + stages, snapshotted to committed files)
